---
title: "Research & Publications"
listing:
  - id: gallery
    contents: "featured/*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
    page-size: 6   # Pagination (so many cards don't clutter the page)
    max-description-length: 175
title-block-banner: true
---

Here you can find an overview of our research projects and publications.

:::{#gallery}
:::
